heading: Latest news
subheading: Announcements, talks, and moments from the QuantumX Foundation community.

items.title: Meet the winning teams of QX Hack
items.summary: Infinity Loop, Nexus, and Anurag won top three spots at QX Hack.

items.title: Spent the week in London
items.summary: We visited Imperial College London and Oxford for research and innovation events.

items.title: Attended the BQIT:27 workshop at the University of Bristol
items.summary: We discussed quantum information technology's future at the University of Bristol.

items.title: 25+ curious minds, one quantum workshop with Skill University
items.summary: We ran a quantum workshop and cohort session with Skill University.

items.title: QuantumX School's first cohort is done
items.summary: Our first QuantumX School cohort wrapped up, with more coming in March.

items.title: Introducing the Qubit Database
items.summary: A dashboard comparing qubit technologies built by companies and research labs worldwide.

items.title: The quantum track at DeepTech Conf
items.summary: Three talks on India's quantum readiness, security, communication, and post-quantum cryptography.

items.title: An inspiring session at NYU Abu Dhabi with Prof. John Martinis
items.summary: We attended a seminar with Nobel laureate Prof. John Martinis on qubits.

items.title: Two days that built momentum for quantum in Bengaluru
items.summary: A workshop with Skill University, followed by a community meetup and panel.

items.title: Announcing the Quantum for Social Good Hackathon
items.summary: 10 hours, real-world problems, and working MVPs built with quantum-inspired ideas.

items.title: Bringing the quantum perspective to DeepTech Hackers Day
items.summary: We joined a full-day jam on AI, Web3, and Quantum in Bengaluru.

items.title: The Quantum Future Series: Bengaluru community meetup
items.summary: An evening of quantum conversations with developers, researchers, and the curious.

items.title: Speaking at Manipal Institute of Technology's 5-day Faculty Development Programme
items.summary: A week on decoherence and post-quantum cryptography with faculty at MIT Bengaluru.

items.title: Introducing the QuantumX Vulnerability Dashboard
items.summary: A community dashboard tracking which security systems quantum computers could break.

items.title: Attending CyberQ 2025 in Abu Dhabi
items.summary: We joined CyberQ 2025 to explore the future of post-quantum cybersecurity.

items.title: A week in Kuala Lumpur at the Post-Quantum Cryptography Conference 2025
items.summary: We joined the global community migrating to quantum-safe cryptography in Kuala Lumpur.

items.title: Here's the full curriculum for our Quantum Course
items.summary: 8 live sessions on quantum computing, Qiskit programming, and real-world applications.

items.title: Introducing Quark, our open-source quantum circuit fingerprinting tool
items.summary: A lightweight model that finds duplicate quantum circuits fast, open-source and licensed.

items.title: Meet DsynQ, our new AI-assisted quantum photonic circuit design platform
items.summary: DsynQ turns circuit requirements into fabrication-ready chip designs. Research preview live now.

items.title: A great conversation on the future of security
items.summary: Our founder spoke on internet crime, safety, and cyber security practice.
